titles.title: (Zion) I Will Bring You Back Home

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O daughters of Zion O Abraham's sons Hear the words of your Father Hear His promise of love I will make you a blessing Count the stars if you can You will be a great nation I will give you this land

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will bring you back home Bring you back home Oh My children You will no longer roam Lost and alone in the night There is nothing on earth that could take you away Once I gather you under My wings I will bring you all back home again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though you've wandered like strangers To the ends of the earth I will send you a savior I will finish my work You have no other shepherd You have no other lord Green pastures are waiting in Zion once more

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So we pray for the peace But look to the East For the Sun rises sudden and fierce Every prophet and priest and king in the City Will look on the One they have pierced We will mourn for the One we have pierced

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But don't fear O my daughters Or sons of Abraham I will wash you with water I will offer the Lamb Though your sins were like scarlet They'll be whiter than snow I have always been with you I will never let go

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will bring you back home I'll bring you back home Oh My children You will no longer roam Lost and alone in the night There is nothing on earth that could take you away I will gather you under My wings I will bring you all back home I will bring you all back home again
